original_statement: what is the most common position/rank achieved?
mutated_statement: what is the most common state/status achieved and the least common state/status achieved?
mutation_analysis: 术语替换 + 查询扩展 + 数量增加: “position/rank” 被替换为 “state/status” | 并列增加了对“least common …”的询问，将单一“most common”扩展为“most common and least common” (position/rank → state/status | what is the most common position/rank achieved? → what is the most common state/status achieved and the least common state/status achieved?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 尝试修正矛盾指令（迭代修正机制）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought和critique可识别关键线索：iteration0的judge_thought已按Position列给出计数并指出预测缺失，iteration1的critique明确指出select_column步骤错误并建议修正。Agent在after_refine阶段通过增加列、重新选择/分组/排序并在simple_query中明确返回“2nd|4th|6th|7th|–”来纠正先前的操作失误并最终得到正确结论。Agent未向用户主动询问澄清，而是通过内部迭代修正执行流程将问题变为可解并输出结果，符合“迭代修正机制”——通过多轮内部修正把原始（或变异）指令转为可执行的明确问题并得出答案。
